risinfo.chaptertitle: Appendix II. Test Your Knowledge! Answer Key

listitem.para: a. Scope of practice is used to define the procedures, actions, and processes that are permitted for a licensed individual. Scope of practice may also address the delegation of health care activities to unlicensed individuals and the delegation of certain or other QHP/ NQHCP has ascertained have the education, training, and/or certification necessary to safely perform the activity.

b. Online medical assessment and management (98970–98972) are independently provided and reported by NQHCPs. NQHCPs typically have a scope of practice that does not include independent provision and reporting of evaluation and management services.

d. The cumulative time is used in code selection for the online assessment and management services. One code and 1 unit of service are reported for the sum of communications pertaining to the online encounter during a 7-day period.
a. True. Lactation consultation services do not have a specific CPT code. HCPCS code 59443 is the code most specific to lactation services.
a. A standardized curriculum is used, and the time-based services are prescribed by a physician or QHP.
